name: Generic Building
description: General-purpose building footprint model with common attributes like address, use type, and floor count.
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: Generic POI
description: General-purpose Point of Interest model with common attributes like name, category, address, and contact information.
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: GIF Spatial Core (Address / Facility / Building / Land)
description: GIF (Government Interoperability Framework) reference model for spatial entities. Defines a normalized Address as a shared lookup, then Facility (POINT), Building (POLYGON), and Land (POLYGON), all referencing Address. Demonstrates the multi-model + reference pattern. Source: JDA-DM/GIF v2.3 Core Data Model XSD (https://github.com/JDA-DM/GIF). Field labels are Japanese to match the official specification; per-field English notes live in this top-level description and in each model description.
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: 自治体標準ODS - 公共施設一覧
description: Municipal Standard Open Data Set: Public facilities (役所/公民館/図書館/学校/公園 etc.). Single-model POINT template matching the official CSV column definition (Definition A) published by デジタル庁. Field labels are the exact Japanese column names from the spec; field keys are English snake_case. Coordinates are WGS84 / EPSG:4326. Source: https://www.digital.go.jp/resources/open_data/municipal-standard-data-set-test
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: 自治体標準ODS - 医療機関一覧
description: Municipal Standard Open Data Set: Medical institutions (病院/診療所/歯科/薬局 etc.). Single-model POINT template matching the official CSV column definition (Definition A) published by デジタル庁. Field labels are the exact Japanese column names from the spec; field keys are English snake_case. Coordinates are WGS84 / EPSG:4326. Source: https://www.digital.go.jp/resources/open_data/municipal-standard-data-set-test
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: 自治体標準ODS - 指定緊急避難場所一覧
description: Municipal Standard Open Data Set: Designated Emergency Evacuation Sites. Single-model POINT template matching the official CSV column definition (Definition A) published by デジタル庁. Site categories follow 災害対策基本法 (Disaster Countermeasures Basic Act) classifications: 洪水/崖崩れ・土石流及び地滑り/高潮/地震/津波/大規模な火事/内水氾濫/火山現象. Field labels are the exact Japanese column names; field keys are English snake_case. Coordinates are WGS84 / EPSG:4326. Source: https://www.digital.go.jp/resources/open_data/municipal-standard-data-set-test
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: 自治体標準ODS - AED設置箇所一覧
description: Municipal Standard Open Data Set: AED installation locations. Single-model POINT template matching the official CSV column definition (Definition A) published by デジタル庁 (Japan Digital Agency). All field labels are the exact Japanese column names from the spec; field keys are English snake_case. Coordinates are WGS84 / EPSG:4326. Source: https://www.digital.go.jp/resources/open_data/municipal-standard-data-set-test
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: OSM Building
description: Building model aligned with OpenStreetMap building tags. Suitable for importing and managing OSM building data.
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: PLATEAU Building (bldg)
description: Building model based on Japan's PLATEAU 3D city model specification (CityGML bldg module). Includes LOD attributes, structural data, and building use classification.
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: PLATEAU Building District
description: District-level building aggregation model for PLATEAU. Provides summary statistics and zoning information for urban planning and analysis.
author: Spatial CMS Community

name: PLATEAU Road (tran)
description: Road model based on Japan's PLATEAU 3D city model specification (CityGML tran module). Includes road classification, width, and traffic attributes.
author: Spatial CMS Community
